response.justification: Wei Chen has extensive fullstack experience, particularly in TypeScript, React, and Node.js, with a strong background in scalable architectures and modern tooling. However, the role targets an entry-level position requiring foundational skills in PostgreSQL, Nest.js, and clean software architecture, which are less emphasized in his experience. His senior-level roles may not align with the junior/mid-level expectations.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and Node.js expertise with recent fullstack contributions at re:cinq and Optilyz
Proven experience with React and AWS services (CDK, ECS, RDS)
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly and work in collaborative environments
concerns: Overqualified for the junior/mid-level role, risk of disengagement or rapid turnover
Limited explicit experience with PostgreSQL (primarily MongoDB and MySQL)
Experience heavily skewed toward senior/lead roles, which may not fit the entry-level team dynamic
